$comment: c9 per-target __has_include — the UNAVAILABLE arm. The IDENTICAL source as has_include_available, compiled for windows-pe: <sys/time.h> ships availableObjectFormats:[elf,macho] (pe EXCLUDED), so __has_include(<sys/time.h>) is FALSE → the #else branch → exit 7. The pe binary RUNS on the windows leg (local ctest + the windows CI), so exit 7 is a REAL runtime witness that the preprocessor evaluated __has_include per-target (pre-c9 it was pure-existence → true everywhere → exit 42). RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the format-aware hasIncludeCb (or drop sys/time.json's availableObjectFormats) and pe takes the #if branch → exit 42 → this manifest's exit 7 fails. The release arm witnesses the optimizer over the selected branch.
